summary: Iteration 51: Verified resolution time visibility for weather positions. All 14 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: Weather positions table shows all required columns (Market, City, Bucket, Entry, Mark, Size, P&L, Resolves, Time Left, Held), filter buttons (All/6h/6-24h/>24h) and sort buttons (Resolves soonest/Held longest/Best P&L) work correctly. 54 open weather positions: 15 near (<6h), 39 long (>24h).

backend_api_tests: Weather positions have all 6 resolution fields (resolves_at, target_date, time_to_resolution_seconds, time_open_seconds, opened_at, resolution_category) - PASS
resolves_at is valid ISO timestamp ending in Z for all 54 positions - PASS
resolution_category values are valid (near: 15, medium: 0, long: 39) - PASS
opened_at is valid timestamp from earliest buy trade - PASS
time_to_resolution_seconds consistent with resolution_category (near=<6h, medium=6-24h, long=>24h) - PASS
Weather object has parsed data (station_id, target_date, bucket_label, resolves_at_utc) - PASS
target_date is in YYYY-MM-DD format - PASS
Analytics summary has realized_pnl field - PASS
Response includes summaries section with weather stats - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Weather page loads with Open Positions tab showing 54 positions - PASS
Table has all required columns: Market, City, Bucket, Entry, Mark, Size, P&L, Resolves, Time Left, Held - PASS
Filter buttons present: All, <6h, 6-24h, >24h (with data-testid) - PASS
Sort buttons present: Resolves soonest, Held longest, Best P&L (with data-testid) - PASS
Time Left column shows human-readable format (e.g. '4h 6m') - PASS
Resolves column shows formatted date (e.g. 'Mar 17, 23:59 UTC') - PASS
Held column shows time held (e.g. '46h 37m') - PASS
<6h filter correctly filters to 15 near-resolution positions - PASS
>24h filter correctly filters to 39 long-resolution positions - PASS
Held longest sort reorders positions by time_open_seconds descending - PASS
Best P&L sort reorders positions by unrealized_pnl descending - PASS

details: resolves_at: Valid ISO timestamp ending in Z (e.g., '2026-03-17T23:59:00Z')
target_date: Parsed from question text in YYYY-MM-DD format
time_to_resolution_seconds: Seconds until resolution (e.g., 14895 for 4h)
time_open_seconds: Seconds since opened_at (e.g., 167729 for ~46h)
opened_at: Timestamp from earliest buy trade for token_id
resolution_category: 'near' (<6h), 'medium' (6-24h), 'long' (>24h)
Parses 'on March 17' without year - assumes current year 2026
Parses 'on March 17, 2026' with year
Sets resolution time to 23:59:00Z on target date
All 54 positions have valid parsed dates
All: Shows all 54 positions
<6h (near): Shows 15 positions resolving within 6 hours
6-24h (medium): Shows 0 positions (none in this range currently)
>24h (long): Shows 39 positions resolving after 24 hours
Resolves soonest: Sorts by time_to_resolution_seconds ascending (default)
Held longest: Sorts by time_open_seconds descending
Best P&L: Sorts by unrealized_pnl descending
Time Left: Shows '4h 6m' format for near-resolution
Time Left: Shows '28h 6m' format for long-resolution
Resolves: Shows 'Mar 17, 23:59 UTC' format
Held: Shows '46h 37m' format for time held

sample_weather_position.market_question: Will the highest temperature in New York City be 50°F or higher on March 17?

test_credentials: None required - paper mode, no auth
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data (54 open weather positions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 verified resolution time visibility for all weather positions. Key findings: (1) All 54 weather positions now include resolves_at (ISO timestamp ending in Z), target_date, time_to_resolution_seconds, time_open_seconds, opened_at, and resolution_category fields. (2) resolution_category breakdown: 15 near (<6h), 0 medium (6-24h), 39 long (>24h). (3) Date parser handles both 'on March 17' (no year, assumes 2026) and 'on March 17, 2026' formats. (4) opened_at is derived from earliest buy trade timestamp for each token_id. (5) Frontend shows all new columns: Resolves (formatted date), Time Left (human-readable), Held (time since opened). (6) Filter buttons (All/<6h/6-24h/>24h) filter by resolution_category. (7) Sort buttons (Resolves soonest/Held longest/Best P&L) reorder positions. (8) All existing features continue to work: analytics summary shows $142.70 realized PnL.
